testcase.name: test_payroll_run_duplicate_check
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comprehensive_features.py:129: in test_payroll_run_duplicate_check assert response.status_code in [200, 201, 400, 409], \ E AssertionError: Payroll run returned unexpected status: 422 - {"detail":[{"type":"int_parsing","loc":["body","month"],"msg":"Input should be a valid integer, unable to parse string as an integer","input":"2026-02","url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/int_parsing"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201, 400, 409] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_reassignment_workflow_admin_direct
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comprehensive_features.py:358: in test_reassignment_workflow_admin_direct assert response.status_code == 200, f"Admin reassignment failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Admin reassignment failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","lead_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"new_agent_id":"51bee6bd-84a9-480a-aca8-1e93d6ece235","current_agent_id":"1c55fb37-3c72-4d2a-9935-c2b97b502495","reason":"TEST_Admin direct reassignment"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_lead_detail
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comprehensive_features.py:507: in test_lead_detail assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get lead detail failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get lead detail failed: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code
